Latest opportunities Tech with a Twist Tech with a Twist In this section Culture Tech with a Twist Job Opportunities Menu English en English Français Menu Home Our Brands Our Brands A comprehensive portfolio of more than 200 premium brands, from local favourites to global heroes. From our roots in Marseille, we have used our passion for conviviality to distil an unrivalled portfolio of premium brands. From international heroes loved around the world to local favourites, each has its own unique history and role in the special moments of life. 200+ Brands #1 in premium international spirits 18 brands in global top 100 House of Brands Our constantly evolving portfolio of brands combines some of the world’s best-loved drinks with a constantly evolving portfolio that is always in line with new trends and tastes. Find out more Visit our exceptional brands 40 destinations around the world where you can experience our brands, from Strathisla, the home of Chivas and the oldest working distillery in the Scottish Highlands to The Chuan, in China, or Ki No Bi in Japan.
